name: Sincronizador SSOT — Google Drive → Supabase Vector

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.knowledge_base (title, content, source, source_url, tags, embedding)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Converter para Chunks').item.json.title }}',
  '{{ $('Converter para Chunks').item.json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'google_drive',
  '{{ $('Converter para Chunks').item.json.source_url }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $('Converter para Chunks').item.json.tags.map(t => `'${t}'`).join(',') }}],
  '[{{ $json.embedding.values.join(',') }}]'::vector
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { synced: items.length, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'ok' } }];
